questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Triumph
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. The company plans to <u>expand</u> its operations into global markets soon.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. They all felt that the movie was truly <u>captivating</u> and unforgettable.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. Rakesh committed the mistake, and he must be <u>convicted</u>.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. The children's laughter was filled with <u>exuberant</u> joy.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word in the given sentence. The athlete demonstrated remarkable agility during the gymnastics routine.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM to substitute the underlined word in the given sentence. In what ways do you find technological advancements <u>beneficial</u> to your daily life?

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word. The new syllabus of Final Semester of MBA is very <u>difficult</u>.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word. The partners ended up being traitorous to each other.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. He is known for his <u>humility</u>.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. I don't prefer to remain alone at home in the evenings because loneliness evokes a sense of <u>melancholy</u> and grief within me.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Bulging

Select the word that is OPPOSITE in meaning to the underlined word in the given sentence. The name should also be <u>beneficial</u> to a strong, long-lasting marketing campaign.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word in the given sentence. The author's writing style is characterised by a subtle and nuanced use of language.
